data.text: P05/07 FELISIAN WORLD. AT 20.52 WAS GRASSLAND WITH BUSHES AND
SOME TREES; TWO HOPPER GREETING ON LANDING. 227.40 HAD PINNACLES
TO THE EAST WITH MANY OVERLY ENTHUSIASTIC HOPPERS VYING FOR
ATTENTION DURING THE ENTIRE VISIT. 60.115 WAS AN ARCHIPELAGO OF
ROCKY ISLANDS IN THE ICE, WITH A LONE ICE HOPPER SCAMPERING ABOUT.
130.69 IS MOSTLY GRASSY WITH HILLS AND ROLLING GROUND MIXED WITH
LOTS OF TREES AND BUSHES; A SMALLISH PIT IS PROVIDED FOR YOUR
ENTERTAINMENT AT 34.-5; AN OBJECT SIGHTED WHILE LANDING TOWARD SSE
WAS SUSPECT OF BEING ONLY AN ANGULAR GRASS COVERED OBJECT WAS JUST
